summary: [deterministic] all deterministic checks passed for engineering-vllm-inference-blueprint | [judge] [fallback from codex] All 9 success criteria are met. cargo check/clippy/fmt pass clean (zero first-party warnings), 32 tests pass across config (6), health (6), billing (11), and server (8) modules. Config-driven vLLM endpoint via OnceLock, tokio BufReader stderr draining, semaphore concurrency limiting, CI workflow with fmt/clippy/test/forge, spending-key validation, and billing limit enforcement are all correctly implemented. The prior round's two findings (spending key validation and hardcoded model name) are resolved.

findings.title: CorsLayer::permissive() in production HTTP server
findings.body: server.rs uses CorsLayer::permissive() which allows any origin, method, and header. For a billing-gated inference endpoint handling SpendAuth signatures, a more restrictive CORS policy would reduce attack surface. This is acceptable if the blueprint is designed to accept requests from arbitrary frontends, but should be a conscious decision.

findings.title: VLLM_MODEL_NAME fallback inconsistent with VLLM_BASE_URL/VLLM_CLIENT error handling
findings.body: lib.rs lines 79-101 return explicit errors if VLLM_BASE_URL or VLLM_CLIENT aren't initialized, but line 102-105 silently falls back to "default" for VLLM_MODEL_NAME. Since all three are set together in InferenceServer::start() (lines 175-177), this fallback is unreachable in practice, but the inconsistency is a minor code smell.
findings.evidence: operator/src/lib.rs:102-105 — .unwrap_or("default") vs explicit error returns for the other two OnceLocks

evidence.label: cargo test --workspace
evidence.value: 32 passed, 0 failed. Coverage: config (6), health (6), billing (11), server (8).

evidence.label: CI workflow
evidence.value: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists with fmt, clippy, test matrix + Solidity forge build/test job.

evidence.label: config-driven vLLM endpoint
evidence.value: OnceLock<String> set from config.vllm.host/port in InferenceServer::start() (lib.rs:174). No hardcoded http://127.0.0.1:8000 remains.

evidence.label: stderr draining
evidence.value: vllm.rs:60-68 — tokio BufReader + lines() drain, forwarded to tracing::info.

evidence.label: concurrency limiting
evidence.value: Semaphore::new(config.server.max_concurrent_requests) in lib.rs:225-227, enforced via try_acquire in server.rs:162 returning 429.

evidence.label: spending key validation
evidence.value: server.rs:227-262 — recovered signer checked against on-chain getAccount().spendingKey via BillingClient::get_spending_key().

evidence.label: billing limits enforced
evidence.value: server.rs:265-310 — max_spend_per_request and min_credit_balance validated against authorized amount.
